'''Kern Fallon''' was a [[Senior Lieutenant/Legends|Senior Lieutenant]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] stationed on the [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|Dreadnaught]] ''[[Imperial Destiny]]'' based on [[Teth/Legends|Teth]]. He was the aide to [[Winstel Greelanx|Admiral Greelanx]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' {{1st}}
